arts.ttl: Manchester United told to ‘stick with Harry Maguire up front’
arts.sum: Harry Redknapp has told Manchester United to ‘stick with Harry Maguire up front’ after the defender’s dramatic winner against Lyon. Maguire scored a 121st-minute winner as Manchester United won 5-4 against Lyon on Thursday to reach the Europa League semi-finals.
